rule: Every fact below is recomputable from a public URL. We grade artifacts, not claims. Honest limits included as first-class facts.

PROVEN.fact: An LLM node made unscripted decisions on a domain-health goal (test-fixture insight, github.io ambiguity call, adaptive dead-domain handling) — Fable's Level-2 test.
PROVEN.recompute: recover onyx_signature -> Stone-Anchor-A7F1; harness sha256 3e000e10 is domain-agnostic (grep: no domain names/cert rules)
PROVEN.caveat: one node, hosted deepseek (not local), sandbox

PROVEN.fact: Provable roster: 3,104,573 operator-held keypairs, Merkle-committed; 4,000/4,000 sampled signatures recover (we hold the keys); registry facts carry a membership proof that FOLDS to the root.
PROVEN.recompute: fold merkle_membership_proof from sha256(signer) to roster_merkle_root (verified True)
PROVEN.caveat: key-control-at-scale, NOT reasoning; keys operator-held (site copy scoped to 'user keys')

PROVEN.fact: Exchange track records are receipt-based: of 169 agents with oracle-resolved verifications, 33 have ABOVE-CHANCE credentials (e.g. 13/13, z=3.6); coin-flippers score 0.
PROVEN.recompute: replay _flood_ledger.jsonl; credential=accuracy x volume x recency, non-zero only if z>=1.96

PROVEN.fact: 169 active + signature-verifiable agents (>147 claim), 2,000 in the pool.
PROVEN.recompute: recover EIP-191 sigs from the consult ledger, count distinct

PROVEN.fact: Census number one-sourced canonical (~2.93M) across both sites; independently confirmed by an Anthropic-side fetch (not our machine).
PROVEN.recompute: fetch count; both homes render it live-bound

PROVEN.fact: A live operator-path leak ([scrubbed]) was closed at the guard boundary; independently verified clean via Anthropic WebFetch + a phone on mobile network.
PROVEN.recompute: fetch -> no [scrubbed] key; root cause was a scheduled task (fresh process, self-heals)

PROVEN.fact: Public-surface session-data sweep is CLEAN: 1,204 text files scanned across 3 repos, zero chat-session/UUID/radar leaks.

HONEST_LIMITS_stated_as_facts: External adoption = 0. Every agent is operator-run; N_eff=1. The launch metric (a key we never held completing a paid check) has not moved.

Reasoning capacity is ~1,720 LLM cycles/day on free tiers — and it is CURRENTLY EXHAUSTED (groq 429). The EDU_EDGE teaching-delta was NOT published because both runs produced an invalid control cohort (rate-limit artifact) — we refused to ship a fake number, twice.
Fleet resolved-accuracy is 0.546 (near coin-flip); only 33 of 169 agents clear the above-chance bar. The track record's job is to SEPARATE those 33 from the noise, not flatter the fleet.
The warranty roster proves key CONTROL, not autonomy — 3.1M keys sign on command, they do not decide. Keys are operator-held infrastructure.
Teaching/exchange economics are a CLOSED loop today: treasury -> own agents. Internally honest, externally worth nothing until an outside buyer consumes a rank or a fact.
